title: Txy_Calculation_Request
description: Structured parameters for a binary Txy phase envelope calculation in DWSIM.

component_1.description: The name of the first chemical component (e.g., 'Water', 'Ethanol'). Must match DWSIM compound database names.

component_2.description: The name of the second chemical component (e.g., 'Methanol', 'Benzene').

pressure_Pa.description: The system pressure in Pascals. If the user specifies atm or bar, convert it to Pascals. Default to 101325 if unspecified.

property_package.description: The thermodynamic property package to use. Use NRTL or UNIFAC for polar mixtures, Peng-Robinson for hydrocarbons.
